Hi, I am Rajashree Rakesh Agrawal

I am a

I am a finance professional turned founder, and I am passionate about understanding how businesses work, fixing what is broken, and building what is missing.

Connect with me
About

A little more about me

I am a Chartered Accountant (Equivalent to CPA, USA) and Certified Financial Risk Manager (GARP, USA) with more than six years across audit, banking risk, and entrepreneurship. I started in audit, examining businesses in more than ten industries across India, from hospitals and hotels to factories and schools. I then moved into regulatory risk, first at Credit Suisse, where I worked on Basel capital measurement, and then at JPMorgan, where I analyzed credit and market risk. Most recently, I became a founding member of Ved Investments, an independent investment advisory firm.

I am now heading to the University of Michigan, Ross School of Business, as part of the MBA Class of 2028. Alongside finance, I have been building a technical toolkit: I taught myself Python, ranked in the top five percent of a UC Berkeley statistics course, completed Stanford's Code in Place, and now build agentic AI tools for investment analysis.

Away from work, you will find me on a trail. I have completed more than 35 treks, including the two highest peaks of Maharashtra and trails in the Himalayas, and I have hiked in seven US national parks. I snowboard in winter, I travel cuisine first, and this summer I am volunteering at the FIFA World Cup 2026.

The thread through all of it: I find what does not fit, and I fix the system, not the symptom.

Work

Experience

Apr 2024 – Present

Founding Member, Ved Investments

Pune, India · Independent mutual fund consultancy, ~$7.2M AUM, 300+ clients

Grew AUM from $5.2M to $7.2M, won 5 corporate mandates, built a women focused investing vertical, and established 'Sakhi', the community financial inclusion arm of the firm.

GTM strategyClient acquisitionCommunity impact
Apr 2023 – Apr 2024

Senior Financial Analyst, JPMorgan Chase & Co.

Mumbai, India · Legal Entity Controller, Regulatory Reporting

Delivered daily credit and market risk variance analysis across $50B in exposures, and automated reporting workflows that saved more than 550 hours a year. Recognized with the JPM EMPOWER Award.

Risk analyticsAutomationQlik Sense
Dec 2019 – Jul 2022

Senior Financial Analyst, Credit Suisse

Pune, India · Basel Measurement Reporting

Found and fixed a systemic flaw in RWA calculation worth approximately $200M in savings, and led a team of 7. Recognized with the 2020 Star Award.

Basel / RWARegulatory reportingTeam leadership

What drives my work

Transformation & Automation

I love taking things that are broken, manual, or missing, and rebuilding them so they stay fixed.

This has been the through line of my career, from forensic audits and regulatory risk at global banks to transforming a full advisory business from the ground up. The industries changed, but the instinct stayed the same: find the root cause, redesign the system, automate what machines do better, and free people to do what people do better.

Fraud detection & control redesign Risk capital optimization Reporting automation Digital transformation Go-to-market strategy Agentic AI tooling

The stories behind these are best told in person. Ask me over coffee, or better, over hot chocolate.

Built for fun (and for real)

Projects

Who Will Be a Billionaire?

A playable game app, coded from scratch, and proof that a CA can ship software too. I built it while teaching myself Python, and I loved every bug along the way.

Play it ↗

Ved Investments Website

I vibe coded the website of the firm end to end, from layout to copy to launch. It gave the firm its first real digital footprint and was part of taking a traditional advisory practice online.

Visit site ↗

Quick Mental Maths

A vibe coded practice tool for sharpening mental arithmetic through quick drills against the clock. Built because a finance brain deserves a daily workout.

Try it ↗

Word Finder Game

A fun word finding game where the first and last letters are given and you build the word between them. Vibe coded for the joy of it, and surprisingly addictive.

Play it ↗

This Website

Yes, this one. I vibe coded the site you are reading right now, from structure to styling, and iterated on it the way I iterate on everything: find what does not fit, then fix it.
